# EduSphere

> AI-powered Learning Management System combining knowledge graph intelligence, adaptive AI tutoring (Chavruta), semantic search, and enterprise LMS capabilities. Supports 100,000+ concurrent users.

EduSphere is a B2B/B2C SaaS educational platform for higher education institutions, enterprise L&D teams, and individual learners. Key differentiators include a native knowledge graph for concept relationship mapping, a Socratic AI tutor (Chavruta), and semantic search.

## Platform Overview

EduSphere delivers personalized learning experiences through AI-driven content adaptation, real-time collaboration, and knowledge graph-based concept connections. Supports SCORM 1.2/2004, xAPI/Tin Can, LTI 1.3, and OpenBadges 3.0.

## Core Features

- [AI Tutoring (Chavruta)](https://app.edusphere.dev/features#ai-tutor): Socratic dialogue AI that adapts to your learning pace and style
- [Knowledge Graph](https://app.edusphere.dev/features#knowledge-graph): Visual concept network built from your personal learning history
- [Gamification](https://app.edusphere.dev/features#gamification): 5-level mastery system with streaks, badges, and leaderboards
- [Live Sessions](https://app.edusphere.dev/features#live-sessions): Real-time collaborative learning with attendance tracking
- [Enterprise Grade](https://app.edusphere.dev/features#enterprise): Multi-tenant, SSO/SAML/SCIM, GDPR compliant, WCAG 2.2 AA

## Pricing

- Starter: $12,000/year — Up to 500 YAU, white-label included
- Growth: $32,000/year — Up to 2,000 YAU, advanced analytics
- University: $65,000/year — Up to 10,000 YAU, full compliance suite
- Enterprise: Custom pricing — Unlimited YAU, air-gapped deployment option

## Standards & Compliance

- GDPR compliant — data processing agreements available
- WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility certified
- FERPA compliant
- SCORM 1.2, SCORM 2004, xAPI/Tin Can, LTI 1.3, OpenBadges 3.0
